class.name: EditorDock
class.description:
EditorDock is a [Container] node that can be docked in one of the editor's dock slots. Docks are added by plugins to provide space for controls related to the plugin. You can add a dock by using [method EditorPlugin.add_dock]. The dock can be customized by changing its properties. [codeblock] @tool extends EditorPlugin
# Define the dock class (can be in separate file). class MyDock extends EditorDock: func _init(): title = "My Dock" dock_icon = load("./dock_icon.png")
var dock_content = preload("./dock_content.tscn").instantiate() add_child(dock_content)
# Dock reference. var dock
# Plugin initialization. func _enter_tree(): dock = MyDock.new() add_dock(dock, EditorPlugin.DOCK_SLOT_RIGHT_UL) [/codeblock]

method.name: _load_layout_from_config
method.description: Implement this method to handle loading dock's layout. It's equivalent to [method EditorPlugin._set_window_layout].

method.name: _save_layout_to_config
method.description: Implement this method to handle saving dock's layout. It's equivalent to [method EditorPlugin._get_window_layout].

method.name: _set_horizontal_layout
method.description: Implement this method to handle layout switching. [param enabled] is [code]true[/code] when the dock is being moved to the bottom panel, and [code]false[/code] in other cases. [codeblock] _set_horizontal_layout(enabled): box_container.vertical = not enabled [/codeblock]

members.member: Defines available layouts for the dock. See [enum DockLayout] for available layouts. This property is a bitmask. If you want to make all layouts available, use [code]available_layouts = DOCK_LAYOUT_VERTICAL | DOCK_LAYOUT_HORIZONTAL[/code].
The icon for the dock. If specified, it will override [member icon_name].
The shortcut used to open the dock. Setting this is only reliable before the dock is added.
The icon name for the dock. It has to use an icon name from [code]EditorIcons[/code] in editor theme. You can find the list of available icons [url=https://godot-editor-icons.github.io/]here[/url].
Title of the dock's tab. If empty, the dock's [member Node.name] will be used.

signal.name: tab_style_changed
signal.description: Emitted when the dock's tab style is supposed to change as a result of changing title or icon.

constants.constant: Allows placing the dock in the vertical dock slots on either of the editor. [b]Note:[/b] Currently this flag has no effect, because the bottom panel is not a proper dock slot (yet). The dock can always be vertical.
Allows placing the dock in the editor's bottom panel. Implement [method _set_horizontal_layout] to handle changing layouts.
